items.caption: A close-up view of the emergency exit on a yellow school bus. the exit is clearly marked with the words "emergency exit" in bold, black letters. the bus's exterior is painted a vibrant yellow, and the window next to the exit is partially visible, revealing a glimpse of the interior. the bus is parked in front of a building, suggesting it might be at a school or a similar location. the focus is on the emergency exit, emphasizing its importance in case of an emergency.
